title: SFA update: February 2016
body: "Update is our weekly round-up of business-critical and useful information to Skills Funding Agency colleges, other training organisations and direct grant employers.  Please share Update with your colleagues, who might like to register for web alerts. This will notify them by email when we publish new editions of Update on GOV.UK. If you have any feedback, please email Update. "

taxons.title: Further and higher education, skills and vocational training
